title: Heart Balloons,5pcs I LOVE YOU Balloons,18inch Red Heart Foil Balloons,Valentines Balloons for Valentine’s Day,Wedding,Anniversary,Engagement Party
features: 💖【5pcs Heart Balloons】:The package include 5pcs 18inch red heart shape foil balloons and 1 roll 10m red ribbon.The heart balloons are printed with “I LOVE YOU”,will be the best choice for you to celebrate the special day.
💖【High Quality】:The Valentines balloons are made of premium foil,non-toxic and durable,not easy to brake up.As for the self-sealing value,no need to tie,save your time.
💖【Reusable Balloons】:After the party,the foil balloons can be deflated with the straw in the package and reused for multiple times.
💖【Romantic Red Balloons】:The special heart shape balloons can be used to celebrate the special day with your girlfriend or wife,or celebrate wedding,anniversary,engagement and birthday.
💖【Love Atmosphere】:The heart shaped balloons can crate an exclusive red love atmosphere for party,bring fun to your party and crate a memorable party scene for your family and kids.
